fragrances.name: Sauvage
fragrances.official_description: Fresh spicy aromatic built on Calabrian bergamot and ambroxan.

fragrances.name: Bleu de Chanel
fragrances.official_description: Citrus-woody aromatic centered on grapefruit, ginger, and sandalwood.

fragrances.name: Acqua di Gio
fragrances.official_description: Marine-citrus fresh fragrance inspired by the Mediterranean coast.

fragrances.name: Eros
fragrances.official_description: Sweet aromatic contrast of mint, green apple, and vanilla-tonka.

fragrances.name: 1 Million
fragrances.official_description: Sweet spicy amber with blood mandarin, cinnamon, and leather.

fragrances.name: La Nuit de L'Homme
fragrances.official_description: Soft spicy evening scent led by cardamom, lavender, and cedar.

fragrances.name: Le Male
fragrances.official_description: Iconic sweet fougere pairing lavender and mint with vanilla.

fragrances.name: L'Homme
fragrances.official_description: Clean iris-neroli composition with a powdery, soapy character.

fragrances.name: The One for Men
fragrances.official_description: Warm tobacco-amber with grapefruit, ginger, and cardamom.

fragrances.name: Allure Homme Sport
fragrances.official_description: Sporty citrus-musk with orange, marine notes, and tonka.

fragrances.name: Spicebomb
fragrances.official_description: Explosive spicy blend of cinnamon, saffron, tobacco, and leather.

fragrances.name: Dior Homme Intense
fragrances.official_description: Powdery iris masculine anchored by ambrette, pear, and vetiver.

fragrances.name: La Vie Est Belle
fragrances.official_description: Iris gourmand built on praline, blackcurrant, and patchouli.

fragrances.name: Miss Dior
fragrances.official_description: Modern rose-centric floral with citrus opening and musky drydown.

fragrances.name: Coco Mademoiselle
fragrances.official_description: Fresh oriental-chypre pairing bright citrus with rose, jasmine, and patchouli.

fragrances.name: Black Opium
fragrances.official_description: Coffee-vanilla gourmand brightened by white flowers and pear.

fragrances.name: Flowerbomb
fragrances.official_description: Dense floral bouquet over a sweet patchouli-vanilla base.

fragrances.name: Good Girl
fragrances.official_description: Contrasting almond-coffee opening with tuberose and dark cocoa-tonka base.

fragrances.name: Si
fragrances.official_description: Modern fruity chypre centered on blackcurrant nectar and rose.

fragrances.name: J'adore
fragrances.official_description: Luminous white floral bouquet of ylang-ylang, rose, and jasmine.

fragrances.name: Chloe Eau de Parfum
fragrances.official_description: Powdery rose signature with peony, litchi, and warm amber.

fragrances.name: Daisy
fragrances.official_description: Light fruity-floral with violet, strawberry, and soft musk.

fragrances.name: Bright Crystal
fragrances.official_description: Sheer fruity-floral of yuzu, pomegranate, and peony.

fragrances.name: Light Blue
fragrances.official_description: Crisp Sicilian lemon and apple over cedar, evoking Mediterranean summer.

fragrances.name: CK One
fragrances.official_description: Landmark shared citrus-musk that defined 90s unisex perfumery.

fragrances.name: Terre d'Hermes
fragrances.official_description: Mineral orange-vetiver composition by Jean-Claude Ellena.

fragrances.name: Luna Rossa Carbon
fragrances.official_description: Metallic lavender-ambroxan fragrance with a mineral edge.

fragrances.name: The Most Wanted
fragrances.official_description: Sweet amber-woody built on cardamom, ginger, and amberwood.

fragrances.name: Y Eau de Parfum
fragrances.official_description: Fresh-sweet aromatic of apple, ginger, sage, and amberwood.

fragrances.name: Her
fragrances.official_description: Berry-forward gourmand with jasmine, violet, and dry woods.

fragrances.name: Reflection Man
fragrances.official_description: Refined white-floral masculine built on neroli, jasmine, and sandalwood.

fragrances.name: Interlude Man
fragrances.official_description: Smoky incense-amber built around controlled chaos of oregano and labdanum.

fragrances.name: Jubilation XXV
fragrances.official_description: Opulent fruity-incense oriental marking Amouage's 25th anniversary.

fragrances.name: Grand Soir
fragrances.official_description: Golden evening amber of benzoin, labdanum, and vanilla.

fragrances.name: Oud Satin Mood
fragrances.official_description: Plush rose-oud softened by violet, vanilla, and benzoin.

fragrances.name: Aqua Universalis
fragrances.official_description: Clean-linen citrus musk designed as a universal fresh scent.

fragrances.name: Tobacco Vanille
fragrances.official_description: Rich tobacco leaf sweetened with vanilla, cocoa, and dried fruit.

fragrances.name: Oud Wood
fragrances.official_description: Smooth, approachable oud with rosewood, sandalwood, and vanilla.

fragrances.name: Neroli Portofino
fragrances.official_description: Sparkling Italian citrus-neroli cologne in eau de parfum strength.

fragrances.name: Portrait of a Lady
fragrances.official_description: Monumental Turkish rose over patchouli, incense, and sandalwood by Dominique Ropion.

fragrances.name: Musc Ravageur
fragrances.official_description: Sensual spiced musk with cinnamon, vanilla, and tonka by Maurice Roucel.

fragrances.name: Carnal Flower
fragrances.official_description: Green, camphorous tuberose considered a modern white-floral benchmark.

fragrances.name: Gypsy Water
fragrances.official_description: Airy woody blend of juniper, incense, pine, and sandalwood.

fragrances.name: Bal d'Afrique
fragrances.official_description: Vibrant neroli-violet vetiver inspired by 1920s Paris and African culture.

fragrances.name: Mojave Ghost
fragrances.official_description: Soft musky-woody scent built on ambrette and sandalwood.

fragrances.name: Elysium
fragrances.official_description: Luxurious fresh-aromatic citrus with juniper and ambergris.

fragrances.name: Enigma
fragrances.official_description: Cognac, tobacco, and vanilla amber in Roja Dove's signature opulent style.

fragrances.name: Aventus
fragrances.official_description: Pineapple-birch fruity chypre that became the benchmark modern masculine.

fragrances.name: Green Irish Tweed
fragrances.official_description: Green violet-leaf fougere with lemon verbena and sandalwood.

fragrances.name: Silver Mountain Water
fragrances.official_description: Crisp green tea and blackcurrant evoking alpine streams.

fragrances.name: Santal 33
fragrances.official_description: Smoky-leathery sandalwood that became a cultural phenomenon.

fragrances.name: Another 13
fragrances.official_description: Ambroxan-driven skin musk with pear and jasmine facets.

fragrances.name: Philosykos
fragrances.official_description: Complete fig tree portrait: leaf, fruit, and wood with coconut milkiness.

fragrances.name: Ani
fragrances.official_description: Ginger-vanilla amber extrait with rose and benzoin warmth.

fragrances.name: Naxos
fragrances.official_description: Honeyed tobacco-vanilla with a lavender-citrus Sicilian opening.

fragrances.name: Layton
fragrances.official_description: Sweet apple-lavender amber with vanilla and cardamom.

fragrances.name: Herod
fragrances.official_description: Tobacco leaf and vanilla warmed by cinnamon and incense.

fragrances.name: Oud for Greatness
fragrances.official_description: Saffron-lavender oud designed for maximum projection.

fragrances.name: Chergui
fragrances.official_description: Hay, honey, and tobacco amber named for the Moroccan desert wind.

fragrances.name: Halfeti
fragrances.official_description: Rose-saffron oud inspired by the black roses of Halfeti, Turkey.

fragrances.name: No. 19
fragrances.official_description: Sharp green galbanum-iris chypre with a vetiver-leather base.

fragrances.name: Mitsouko
fragrances.official_description: The defining peach-oakmoss chypre by Jacques Guerlain.

fragrances.name: L'Heure Bleue
fragrances.official_description: Melancholic anise-heliotrope oriental evoking Parisian twilight.

fragrances.name: La Fille de Berlin
fragrances.official_description: Peppery, defiant rose with a musky-amber drydown.

fragrances.name: 24 Faubourg
fragrances.official_description: Solar white-floral amber composed by Maurice Roucel for Hermes.

fragrances.name: Samsara
fragrances.official_description: Sandalwood-jasmine oriental with an unusually high sandalwood dose.

fragrances.name: Fracas
fragrances.official_description: The reference tuberose soliflore, composed by Germaine Cellier.

fragrances.name: Aromatics Elixir
fragrances.official_description: Herbal rose-patchouli chypre with unmistakable presence.

fragrances.name: Feminite du Bois
fragrances.official_description: Pioneering cedar-plum feminine woody by Sheldrake and Bourdon.

fragrances.name: Hypnotic Poison
fragrances.official_description: Bitter almond and vanilla gourmand with a narcotic character.

fragrances.name: Tresor
fragrances.official_description: Peach-rose powdery floral by Sophia Grojsman.

fragrances.name: For Her
fragrances.official_description: Modern musk landmark wrapped in orange blossom and osmanthus.

fragrances.name: Angel
fragrances.official_description: The original gourmand: chocolate-caramel patchouli that created a genre.

fragrances.name: Opium
fragrances.official_description: Spice-laden oriental of clove, myrrh, and amber that defined an era.

fragrances.name: Coco
fragrances.official_description: Spiced amber-floral by Jacques Polge, baroque and warm.

fragrances.name: Noir de Noir
fragrances.official_description: Dark rose-truffle oriental blurring masculine and feminine codes.

fragrances.name: Lyric Man
fragrances.official_description: Rose-forward masculine wrapped in incense, sandalwood, and vanilla.

fragrances.name: Rose 31
fragrances.official_description: Grasse rose made deliberately masculine with cumin, cedar, and incense.

fragrances.name: M7 Oud Absolu
fragrances.official_description: Reissue of the first mainstream Western oud masculine.

fragrances.name: Dior Homme
fragrances.official_description: Lipstick-iris masculine that redefined gender codes in mainstream perfumery.

fragrances.name: Ambre Sultan
fragrances.official_description: Herbal amber reference: oregano and bay over resinous vanilla.

fragrances.name: Avignon
fragrances.official_description: Cold cathedral frankincense from the Incense Series.

fragrances.name: Velvet Rose & Oud
fragrances.official_description: Damask rose darkened with oud and clove in Cologne Intense strength.

fragrances.name: L'Air du Desert Marocain
fragrances.official_description: Dry desert-air amber of cistus, incense, and cedar; a cult unisex masterpiece.

fragrances.name: Egoiste
fragrances.official_description: Rose-sandalwood masculine with spiced mahogany warmth.

fragrances.name: Baccarat Rouge 540
fragrances.official_description: Saffron-amberwood signature famous for its sweet mineral sillage.

fragrances.name: Delina
fragrances.official_description: Litchi-rhubarb Turkish rose with a musky cashmeran base.

fragrances.name: Cloud
fragrances.official_description: Creamy coconut-praline gourmand widely noted for its BR540-adjacent drydown.

fragrances.name: Born in Roma Donna
fragrances.official_description: Jasmine-vanilla with a blackcurrant top and woody undertone.

fragrances.name: Libre
fragrances.official_description: Lavender-orange blossom floral bridging fougere and feminine codes.

fragrances.name: Stronger With You
fragrances.official_description: Chestnut-vanilla sweet masculine with cardamom and sage.

fragrances.name: Paradoxe
fragrances.official_description: Neroli-amber floral musk in Prada's abstract modern style.

fragrances.name: Khamrah
fragrances.official_description: Boozy date-praline gourmand that became a viral budget favorite.

fragrances.name: You
fragrances.official_description: Minimalist skin-scent musk with pink pepper and ambrette.

fragrances.name: Replica By the Fireplace
fragrances.official_description: Smoky chestnut and vanilla recreating a winter fireside.

fragrances.name: No. 5
fragrances.official_description: The archetypal aldehydic floral by Ernest Beaux, still in continuous production.

fragrances.name: Shalimar
fragrances.official_description: Foundational bergamot-vanilla oriental with smoky leather undertones.

fragrances.name: Habit Rouge
fragrances.official_description: Citrus-powder oriental masculine inspired by equestrian tradition.

fragrances.name: Eau Sauvage
fragrances.official_description: Citrus chypre by Edmond Roudnitska, famed for its early use of hedione.

fragrances.name: Youth Dew
fragrances.official_description: Spiced balsamic amber originally launched as a bath oil.
